register.title: Register
register.description: Sign up using your email address and password

successNotification.title: Registration complete
successNotification.description: Registration is complete. Now you need to log in to your account

login.title: Login
login.description: Log in to your account using your email address

recovery.title: Recovery
recovery.description: Recover access to your account by resetting your password. To get started, enter your email address
recovery.description_code: Check your email inbox. If the email is there, you'll receive a 6-digit code
recovery.description_newpass: Great! You now have exactly %{minutes} min. to reset your password. After this time, the request will expire.
recovery.description_newpass_success: Your password has been successfully reset! Save it so you don't forget

successNotification.title: Recovery code sended to your email

errorPlaceholder.title: O-o-oops!
errorPlaceholder.description: There seems to be an error with this request, so please try again later and be sure to let us know. We hope you'll bear with us

modals.needToReloadNote: Restart the application after changing this setting
modals.appReloadNote: Changing this setting will restart the application

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.ownerLabel: You are the founder of this organization

header.title: Create new organization
header.description: With your organization, you can invite users to join so you can work on projects together. For example, you can create collaborative bugs

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: A preview of how the organization will appear in the list

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Select one of your organizations to view or edit its details

inviteCode.title: Invite code
inviteCode.note: This code cannot be changed. You can share this code with trusted individuals so they can join the organization

switch.title: Enable destructive actions
switch.description: Unlocks the danger zone. Click only if you know what you're doing

join.title: Join the organization
join.description: You can join the organization by entering the invitation code

successNotification.title: You have joined the "%{name}" organization
successNotification.description: Good luck! We hope you have a pleasant stay!

errorNotification.title: Error attempting to join an organization

useSystemFonts.title: Use system fonts
useSystemFonts.description: Uses system-ui for interface fonts and monospace for the editor

splashWindow.title: Splash screen
splashWindow.description: Should the splash screen be hidden on startup?

reduceMotion.title: Reduce motion
reduceMotion.description: Reduces visual effects across the application, fewer animations and optimized transitions

boldFont.title: Bold font
boldFont.description: Increases font weight across the application

restoreFolder.title: Restore last folder
restoreFolder.description: Automatically reopen the last opened folder when the app starts

developerMode.title: Developer mode
developerMode.description: Enable developer tools and debugging features

appIcons.title: Application icons
appIcons.description: Changes the application icons throughout the app

editor.builtInPythonCausePlatformNote: {{platformNotSupported}}. Built-in Python environment will be used

textSize.title: Font size
textSize.description: Allows increasing editor text size up to 200%

smoothScroll.title: Smooth scrolling
smoothScroll.description: Disable smooth scrolling in the editor?

pythonRunner.title: Python emulator
pythonRunner.description: Choose the Python version you want to use

fileWindow.title: Colored tabs
fileWindow.description: The bottom part of the active tab will glow in the color of the language

header.title: Add bug information
header.description: Fill in all fields before submitting a bug report

privateBugSwitch.title: Add as private bug
privateBugSwitch.description: In that case, only you will see this bug

header.title: Logout
header.description: This action cannot be undone. If you do this now, you will have to log in again

inner.title: The template contains placeholders
inner.description: Fill them out below or skip this step

projectTab.noData: Open the project to view the data
